history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young male soccer player, with curly dark hair and a focused expression, stands on a green grass field. He is wearing a black soccer jersey with red and white trim around the collar and sleeves. The jersey features a logo with "MHK MAKINA KAUF APARAT" written on it, as well as a smaller logo on the right chest. His black shorts also have a logo on the left thigh and the number "16" in red with a white outline on the right thigh. He is wearing black socks pulled up to his calves and light blue soccer cleats. The background is a blurred green field with a light-colored fence or structure in the distance, suggesting an outdoor sports facility. The lighting appears to be natural daylight, casting soft shadows and highlighting the textures of the grass and fabric. The overall mood is one of anticipation and athletic focus.
